articles.title: Tom Holland reunites with Zendaya, faces Hulk in ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ trailer
articles.description: Tom Holland’s Peter Parker swings back into the life of Zendaya’s MJ in the second “Spider-Man: Brand New Day” trailer released on Thursday, June 18. In the clip shared on Sony Pictures Entertainment’s YouTube channel, Parker is struggling internally as he admits “losing his mind” and being “out of control.” The upcoming film picks up after the events of “Spider-Man: No Way Home,” where the world has no memory of the web-slinging Marvel hero. The trailer shows him battling with Scorpion, portrayed by Michael Mando, then later seeks the help of Mark Rufallo’s Bruce Banner for Parker’s mutation problems. “I [...]... Keep on reading: Tom Holland reunites with Zendaya, faces Hulk in ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ trailer

articles.title: Olivia Wilde goes on Call Her Daddy and talks about Jason Sudeikis and Harry Styles
articles.description: Olivia Wilde is promoting ‘The Invite,’ her first movie as director since the PR disaster surrounding ‘Don’t Worry Darling.’ She’s ready to talk about (most of) it. https://t.co/u4Rez4k45G — New York Magazine (@NYMag) June 17, 2026 -She knew her relationship with Jason Sudeikis was over when she asked him if he got her anything for her birthday and he said, "What would I get you, Olivia? I don't know you." -Says getting publicly served divorce papers at CinemaCon was "incredibly traumatizing." She added that, "Jason has told me that he did not know, and I have to believe that in order to continue. Lawyers can be super fucked up and do fucked-up things, and I’m aware of that. People are never their best selves when they’re engaging in that process.” -Says "people were fucking pissed" at her relationship with Harry Styles. She's very positive when describing their relationship. She said, “We had the loveliest relationship, so sweet and so beautiful and very domestic, kind, and lovely. We existed in this little bubble.” -No mention of Florence Pugh in the interview. Source
articles.source: Livejournal: Discover Global Communities Of Blogge

articles.title: Jordan Klepper Exposes MAGA’s Funniest New Conspiracy Theory
articles.description: Comedy Central MAGA loyalists believe that Donald Trump ’s Reflecting Pool renovation has been sabotaged by his foes, a flabbergasted Jordan Klepper said Tuesday night. The “Daily Show” correspondent exposed the right’s ludicrous conspiracy theory about the Lincoln Memorial pool, which the 80-year-old president decided to renovate at a cost of millions of dollars . That renewal project—consisting of a paint job to turn the pool floor “American Flag Blue”—has now massively backfired, turning bright green thanks to an algae infestation. Read more at The Daily Beast.

articles.title: FORMER OVERWATCH CHARACTER ART DIRECTOR ARNOLD TSANG UNVEILS AZUKI, A NEW ORIGINAL MANGA SERIES
articles.description: First Chapter to Debut Exclusively at Anime Expo 2026 Ahead of Free Global Launch on Azuki.com LOS ANGELES , June 17, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Azuki Labs today announced AZUKI, an original manga series written and illustrated by Arnold Tsang (aka steamboy33 ), the original Character Art Director at Blizzard Entertainment and acclaimed artist behind the character design and visual identity of Overwatch. The series will make its world premiere at Anime Expo 2026 in Los Angeles, where attendees will have the exclusive opportunity to read the first chapter ahead of its public launch on Azuki.com in September 2026. Azuki Labs will showcase the series at Booth WH-424 during Anime Expo (July 2–5), with Tsang appearing throughout the event for live drawing sessions. Beginning in September, AZUKI will be available free on Azuki.com, with new chapters released monthly through a mobile-first reading experience designed for manga fans across all devices. "Manga has always been my first love. I was very fortunate to work on comics early in my career, but my path eventually led me ... Full story available on Benzinga.com

articles.title: Overwatch unveils newest Japanese hero in Season 3 update
articles.description: MANILA, Philippines – Blizzard Entertainment added Shion, a Japanese flanker damage hero who headlines Overwatch’s Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den update released on June 17. She joins the roster as the game’s 52nd hero overall and its fifth playable Japanese hero. Meet Shion, the star of Tiger’s Den Headlining the latest batch of seasonal updates is Shion, an elder and the leader of the Hashimoto clan. Breaking away from the typical hitscan designs, she will be a damage dealer that focuses on aggressive flank positioning and flashy mechanics.
